channel.title: github_trending
channel.description: Latest posts from https://github.com/trending. follow.is: None

item.title: makeplane /plane | TypeScript | N/A
item.description: 🔥🔥🔥 Open-source Jira, Linear, Monday, and ClickUp alternative. Plane is a modern project management platform to manage tasks, sprints, docs, and triage.

item.title: alexzhang13 /rlm | Python | N/A
item.description: General plug-and-play inference library for Recursive Language Models (RLMs), supporting various sandboxes.

item.title: calesthio /OpenMontage | Python | N/A
item.description: World's first open-source, agentic video production system. 12 pipelines, 52 tools, 500+ agent skills. Turn your AI coding assistant into a full video production studio.

item.title: chatwoot /chatwoot | Ruby | N/A
item.description: Open-source live-chat, email support, omni-channel desk. An alternative to Intercom, Zendesk, Salesforce Service Cloud etc. 🔥💬

item.title: nautechsystems /nautilus_trader | Rust | N/A
item.description: Production-grade Rust-native trading engine with deterministic event-driven architecture

item.title: bytedance /UI-TARS-desktop | TypeScript | N/A
item.description: The Open-Source Multimodal AI Agent Stack: Connecting Cutting-Edge AI Models and Agent Infra

item.title: freeCodeCamp /freeCodeCamp | TypeScript | N/A
item.description: freeCodeCamp.org's open-source codebase and curriculum. Learn math, programming, and computer science for free.

item.title: yairm210 /Unciv | Kotlin | N/A
item.description: Open-source Android/Desktop remake of Civ V

item.title: mattpocock /skills | Shell | N/A
item.description: Skills for Real Engineers. Straight from my .claude directory.

item.title: Universal-Debloater-Alliance /universal-android-debloater-next-generation | Rust | N/A
item.description: Cross-platform GUI written in Rust using ADB to debloat non-rooted Android devices. Improve your privacy, the security and battery life of your device.

item.title: krahets /hello-algo | Java | N/A
item.description: 《Hello 算法》：动画图解、一键运行的数据结构与算法教程。支持简中、繁中、English、日本語，提供 Python, Java, C++, C, C#, JS, Go, Swift, Rust, Ruby, Kotlin, TS, Dart 等代码实现

item.title: penpot /penpot | Clojure | N/A
item.description: Penpot: The open-source design tool for design and code collaboration

item.title: continuedev /continue | TypeScript | N/A
item.description: open-source coding agent

item.title: RocketChat /Rocket.Chat | TypeScript | N/A
item.description: The Secure CommsOS™ for mission-critical operations

item.title: google-research /timesfm | Python | N/A
item.description: TimesFM (Time Series Foundation Model) is a pretrained time-series foundation model developed by Google Research for time-series forecasting.

item.title: obra /superpowers | Shell | N/A
item.description: An agentic skills framework & software development methodology that works.

item.title: meshery /meshery | TypeScript | N/A
item.description: Meshery, the cloud native manager

item.title: Panniantong /Agent-Reach | Python | N/A
item.description: Give your AI agent eyes to see the entire internet. Read & search Twitter, Reddit, YouTube, GitHub, Bilibili, XiaoHongShu — one CLI, zero API fees.

item.title: n0-computer /iroh | Rust | N/A
item.description: IP addresses break, dial keys instead. Modular networking stack in Rust.

item.title: DeusData /codebase-memory-mcp | C | N/A
item.description: High-performance code intelligence MCP server. Indexes codebases into a persistent knowledge graph — average repo in milliseconds. 158 languages, sub-ms queries, 99% fewer tokens. Single static binary, zero dependencies.
